data.title: Cloud-First Strategy
data.description: Microsoft's architectural approach prioritizes cloud services for scalability and flexibility.

data.title: Service-Oriented Architecture
data.description: Focus on modular components that provide services across the organization.

data.title: Cross-Platform Compatibility
data.description: Ensures applications work seamlessly across different devices and operating systems.

data.title: Decentralized Data Management
data.description: Data handling strategy emphasizing localized data processing to improve latency and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Azure Cosmos DB, Data Lakes, Edge Computing

data.title: Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment
data.description: Automated CI/CD pipelines for faster and more reliable software delivery.
